channel.title: Nicotine Science and Policy
channel.description: Daily digest of views, debates and discussions on nicotine science, policy, regulation and advocacy.

item.title: Irish Government Grows Ever More Hostile to Vaping
item.description: The Irish government has ramped up its hostility towards safer nicotine products by approving new legislation to further tighten restrictions on vapes and nicotine pouches. Though the announcement is confusingly worded, the bill threatens to ban vape flavors. (Published on March 12, 2026byfiltermag.org)

item.title: Lords Debate Vape Bill
item.description: Lords debated the Tobacco and Vapes Bill in the House of Lords on the first day of Report stage – with Action on Smoking and Health calling it “a significant moment for public health”. (Published on March 12, 2026byplanetofthevapes.co.uk)

item.title: EU's Civil Society Advisory Body Urges "Less Harm, Less Tax" Approach in Tobacco Tax Reform
item.description: Europe's tobacco taxation framework is being reformed for the first time in over a decade, and the stakes are higher than the technical language of excise directives might suggest. Done well, the revision modernises a law that has not kept pace with the market. Done badly, it pushes consumers toward the black market, hollows out legitimate industry and costs member states the revenue they were trying to protect. (Published on March 12, 2026byeureporter.co)

item.title: Global Forum on Nicotine 2026 to Explore Why Prohibition of Safer Nicotine Products Risks, and Does Not Protect, Public Health
item.description: Registration is now open for the 13th annual Global Forum on Nicotine (GFN 2026), taking place from Wednesday 3 to Friday 5 June at The Warsaw Presidential Hotel in Warsaw, Poland. Themed “Prohibition and Public Health”, this year’s event will examine a deep structural contradiction emerging between science and global public health policy. (Published on March 12, 2026by2firsts.com)

item.title: US Youth Vaping Continues to Fall as Cigarette Smoking Nears Historic Low
item.description: Youth vaping in the United States continued to decline in 2025, while smoking among teenagers remained close to historic lows, according to new analysis of the National Youth Tobacco Survey (NYTS). (Published on March 12, 2026byclearingtheair.eu)
